strengths: Possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience, dating back to 2006, fulfilling the core minimum requirement.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and community leadership, evidenced by founding GISCollective and running technical workshops.
Has hands-on, modern AI builder experience, specifically working with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks the required recognized expertise and deep background in AI/ML, with AI experience limited to a recent Staff Engineer role.
Experience aligns more with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than the requested Director-level strategic advisor.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum experience requirement with over 15 years in software engineering, having worked on diverse projects since 2006, and he satisfies the entrepreneurial preference as the Founder of GISCollective. However, this Director-level role requires recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory capabilities. Bogdan's AI experience is limited to his very recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at re:cinq. He lacks the preferred MS/PhD in AI and shows no concrete evidence of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption at an enterprise level. Because his profile is that of a strong Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than an AI Strategy Director, his score reflects a mismatch in specialized expertise and seniority.
